title: Update pause tests per QE suggestions and convert to gingko
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

Per @baude's suggestion, converting to gingko testing.  

Updates the podman pause test per suggetions from QE in https://trello.com/c/u25tqDA7/677-2-kpod-provide-kpod-pause-qe-tips.  In short they suggested pausing two containers at once and using the id for one and the name for the other to reference them.

comments.body: Red Hat CI has no errors and the Travis CI log is 'null'.  Going to try to retest.
How about we migrate them to ginkgo, add this new test, and then git rm test/podman_pause.sh? I can walk you through it.
